rule_metadata.author: Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Possible Impacket DCOMExec Connection Attempt - Zeek

rules.rule_text:
title: Possible Impacket DCOMExec Connection Attempt - Zeek
id: f6127748-4656-435f-b07c-c624f8f18812
status: experimental
description: Detects attempts to connect via DCOM Endpoints, as used by Impacket DCOMExec.
  This event will occur on successful or unsuccessful attempts using any of the three
  DCOMExec -object options.
references:
- https://github.com/fortra/impacket/blob/master/impacket/dcerpc/v5/dcomrt.py
- https://tools.thehacker.recipes/impacket
- https://riccardoancarani.github.io/2020-05-10-hunting-for-impacket/
- https://wadcoms.github.io/wadcoms/Impacket-DCOMExec/
author: Micah Babinski
date: 2023/01/08
tags:
- attack.s0357
- attack.execution
- attack.lateral_movement
- attack.t1021
- attack.t1021.003
logsource:
  product: zeek
  service: dce_rpc
detection:
  selection:
    operation: RemoteCreateInstance
    endpoint: IRemoteSCMActivator
    id.resp_p: 135
    named_pipe: 135
  condition: selection
fields:
- id.orig_h
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
